ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "source_image" TEXT /* Source image name/path */,
  "output_format" TEXT /* Output format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG, GIF) */,
  "quality" INTEGER /* Quality of the image (1-100%) */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated tags for the image */,
  "categories" TEXT /* Comma-separated categories for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the image library (e.g., GD, ImageMagick, NetPBM) */,
  "library_path" TEXT /* Server path to the image library */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the image library */,
  "supported_formats" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of supported formats */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image setting */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the setting */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image library used for the setting */,
  "quality" INTEGER /* Quality of the image (1-100%) */,
  "dynamic_output" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the image is output dynamically */,
  "resize_width" INTEGER /* Width for resizing the image */,
  "resize_height" INTEGER /* Height for resizing the image */,
  "crop_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate for cropping the image */,
  "crop_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate for cropping the image */,
  "crop_width" INTEGER /* Width for cropping the image */,
  "crop_height" INTEGER /* Height for cropping the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_settings_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES image_libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_settings_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, developer, designer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, developer, designer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity (e.g., image resizing, cropping) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the activity failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the metric */,
  "processing_time" REAL /* Processing time for the image in seconds */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage for the image in MB */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage for the image in percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error occurred */,
  "error_code" INTEGER /* Error code for the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "caches" (
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cache entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the cache entry */,
  "cache_key" TEXT /* Key used to identify the cache entry */,
  "cache_value" TEXT /* Value stored in the cache */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cache entry expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cache_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_caches_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migrations" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration */,
  "migration_name" TEXT /* Name of the migration */,
  "migration_date" TEXT /* Date when the migration occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the migration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the image format (e.g., JPEG, PNG, GIF) */,
  "format_extension" TEXT /* File extension for the image format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the image size (e.g., thumbnail, medium, large) */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image size */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_size_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image size setting */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the setting */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image size */,
  "quality" INTEGER /* Quality of the image (1-100%) */,
  "dynamic_output" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the image is output dynamically */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_size_settings_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES image_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_size_settings_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)
